zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory Boswell於大約1440年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell30歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Melville28歲。她於1458年與John Bethune V of Belfour在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭可希享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory Boswell于大约1440年出生在苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell30岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Melville28岁。她于1458年与John Bethune V of Belfour在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年在苏格兰薩瑟蘭可希享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

variants.name: Buswell
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

variants.name: Biswell
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire): possibly from a lost or unidentified place called with Old English bēos ‘coarse grass’ + wella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, a variant of Boswell .

variants.name: Bussell
meanings: English: variant of   Boswell   (of Norman origin) or   Bissell   1.

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory Boswell was born about 1440, in Fife, Scotland, her father, David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell, was 30 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Melville, was 28. She married John Bethune V of Belfour in 1458, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1530, in Creich, Sutherland, Scotland, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory Boswell est née environ 1440, à Fife, Écosse, son père, David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Melville, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Bethune V of Belfour en 1458, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1530, à Creich, Sutherland, Écosse, à l’âge de 91 ans.

Sie hat 1458 in Fife, Scotland John Bethune V of Belfour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1530 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Creich, Sutherland, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Boswell è nata il circa 1440 nel Fife, Scotland, sua padre, David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Melville, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Bethune V of Belfour nel 1458, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1530, nel Creich, Sutherland, Scotland, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory Boswellが約1440年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswellは30歳，母Lady Elizabeth Melvilleは28歳であった。1458年にスコットランドフィフでJohn Bethune V of Belfourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年にスコットランドススエルランドクレイチで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory Boswell(이)가 대략 1440년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Melville(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1458년 스컷랜드 피프에서 John Bethune V of Belfour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드 크레이치에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory Boswell родилась около 1440 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Melville, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bethune V of Belfour в 1458 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности краич, сутирланд, Шотландия в возрасте 91 год.
